items: `scripts/parse_rsud_rengasdengklok.py` — Parser untuk PDF Pengumuman Hasil Seleksi Administrasi Pegawai BLUD Non ASN RSUD Rengasdengklok 2025. Menangani tabel `pdftotext` yang wrap: nama, posisi, catatan, dan nomor urut bisa tersebar di baris tetangga.
`scripts/process_rsud_rengasdengklok.py` — Runner document + BatchProcessor untuk hasil parser RSUD Rengasdengklok, dengan facts schema-safe dan edge provenance dua arah.

Processed Pengumuman Hasil Seleksi Administrasi Pegawai BLUD Non ASN RSUD Rengasdengklok 2025 — 375 persons from 20-page PDF. Source: `fkep.unpad.ac.id`. OSINT external scan was blocked by escalation reviewer due third-party disclosure risk.

`scripts/parse_skd_bukittinggi.py` — Parser untuk PDF SSCN 2018 format `HASIL SELEKSI KOMPETENSI DASAR`. Menangani struktur berulang: halaman REKAPITULASI (skip) + halaman detail (extract person). Formasi context (lokasi, jabatan, pendidikan) di-associate ke setiap person.
`scripts/process_skd_bukittinggi.py` — Runner document + BatchProcessor untuk hasil parser SKD Bukittinggi.
Processed Pengumuman Hasil SKD CPNS Kota Bukittinggi 2018 — 180 persons from 67 formasi jabatan, 137-page PDF. Source: `admin.bukittinggikota.go.id`.
AGENT.md: Added SKD CPNS SSCN tabular format note — SSCN-generated reports have alternating REKAPITULASI + HASIL SELEKSI pages; formasi headers appear AFTER the section title, not before.
AGENT.md / `next_manual.txt`: Added RSUD Rengasdengklok wrapped-table parser reminder and explicit handling for OSINT scanner blocks caused by external disclosure approval.

`templates/laporan_pelatihan.json` — Template untuk laporan pelatihan/diklat PUPR atau instansi pemerintah. Keywords: laporan pelatihan, biodata peserta, daftar penceramah, widyaiswara, pelatihan teknis berjenjang. Identifiers: employee_id, phone, email. Person count: many. `has_photos: true` — setiap halaman biodata memiliki foto wajah.

Processed Laporan Pelatihan Teknis Berjenjang Tingkat Pertama Bidang Perumahan 2022 — 60 persons (40 peserta biodata + 4 panitia + 16 penceramah/instruktur) from 148-page PDF. 40 face photos extracted via `face_crop.py`.

`scripts/validate_dataset.py` — Strict document/person contract validator for post-run audits. Checks sample-aligned person fields, fact enum/source document, changelog entries, document mentions, and bidirectional person-document provenance before commit.

`scripts/parse_cpns_integrasi.py` — Parser fixed-width untuk PDF Panselnas/BKN `HASIL INTEGRASI SKD DAN SKB` CPNS 2024. Menangani tabel sangat besar, tanggal lahir dan pendidikan yang wrap vertikal, status khusus (`P/L-E2`, `P/L-U1`), serta menyimpan No Peserta sebagai exam identifier.
`scripts/process_cpns_integrasi.py` — Runner document + BatchProcessor untuk hasil parser CPNS integrasi.
Processed Rekap Hasil Integrasi SKD/SKB CPNS Kementerian Agama 2024 dari `iainkendari.ac.id` — 37,607 persons across 80 jabatan formasi from 9,652-page PDF.
AGENT.md: Photo extraction reminder — biodata sections with photos are NOT N/A, must run face_crop per person page
AGENT.md: Added mandatory script-based strict dataset validation step before staging/commit; `samples/*.json` are now treated as schema contracts.
AGENT.md: Added CPNS SKD/SKB integration parsing rule for Panselnas/BKN fixed-width layouts and special statuses.
`next_manual.txt`: Corrected `download.py` output argument note (`tmp/` is auto-prepended) and added CPNS integration parser reminder for manual runs.

`scripts/parse_cpns_integrasi.py` / `scripts/process_cpns_integrasi.py` / AGENT.md: CPNS integration facts now follow `samples/person.json` strict fact shape by using `type: "other"` and adding `source_document` during document processing.
Normalized existing Kemenag CPNS integration person facts for document `01KSB36DZSBHJ017534EXDH3BM` to add `source_document` and replace non-schema `exam_result` fact type.

`scripts/process_cpns_integrasi.py` / AGENT.md / `samples/person.json`: CPNS integration persons now receive bidirectional provenance edges (`document -> document:<doc_id>`) matching existing repo relation patterns; existing Kemenag CPNS person records were backfilled.

Added `data.changelog[]` entries to existing Kemenag CPNS person records for both fact schema normalization and document-edge provenance backfill; `scripts/process_cpns_integrasi.py` now writes changelog entries when adding document provenance edges.

`scripts/parse_ikn_cpns.py` — OCR text parser for SSCASN SKD CPNS selection results. Handles: degree prefix detection (S-1, D-III, SMA, SLTA, etc.), field-only education keywords (AKUNTANSI, MANAJEMEN, etc.), education split across adjacent lines, multi-line name continuation, and `no_peserta` as exam identifier (not student_id)
`scripts/process_ikn_batch.py` — Document + BatchProcessor runner for large-scale selection result imports
Processed Hasil SKD CPNS Otorita IKN TA 2024 (PENG-5/OIKN.1/2024) — 14,842 persons across 82 jabatan formasi from 1,102-page PDF

Critical: Name/education column swap — Initial parsing assumed education was always inline with person rows. When the PDF table split education to separate lines, the regex mapped the person's name into the education field and vice versa (627 entries affected). Rewrote parser with degree prefix detection and adjacent-line education lookup
Wrong field: no_peserta stored as student_id — SSCASN participant numbers are exam identifiers, not student IDs. Now stored as extra field `No Peserta`
Rebuilt all indexes from scratch to remove stale references from deleted bad entries
AGENT.md: Added "Name Mapping Rules" section with degree prefix detection, adjacent-line education, title-based name confirmation, and no_peserta ≠ student_id rule
Document `01KSAVNQJTCSQBAS9YE2F3R7C7` replaces deleted `01KSAS3C0X55WXCQSF0SX050WM`
`scripts/eligible.py` — Document eligibility pipeline:
`scripts/history.py` — `record-skip` / `check` now distinguishes `processed:<doc_id>` vs `skipped:<reason_code>` (prevents re-OCR of known non-person PDFs)

`scripts/queue.py` — new status `skipped` (non-person documents) separate from `false` (technical errors); `format_error()` helper for consistent error prefixes (`Non-person:`, `Download:`, `OCR:`, etc.)
AGENT.md — pipeline updated: URL precheck (step 4), eligibility assess (step 7), skip path with `record-skip` + queue status `skipped`
`next.txt` / `next_sequence.txt` — checklist aligned with eligibility pipeline
`scripts/summary/collect.py` — queue stats include `skipped` count
`scripts/summary/readme.py` / `scripts/summary/png.py` — dashboard queue section shows `Dilewati (skipped)` segment
`scripts/classify.py` — `is_template_extractable()` helper for eligibility integration
`README.md` — quick commands for `eligible.py precheck` and `assess-pdf`
`templates/_schema.json` — optional `extractable` field documented
`flush_index.sh`: Replaced `rm -f *.json` with `find -delete` to avoid `ARG_MAX` error on directories with 90K+ files
`flush_index.sh`: Added `safe_filename()` to sanitize index values containing `/` that caused `FileNotFoundError`

`scripts/queue.py`: `get_next_pending()` only checked for empty status, not `'pending'`. After mass-update of 282 rows from empty→pending, the function returned "No pending rows". Now accepts both empty and `'pending'` status.

`scripts/classify.py`: Minimum match score threshold reduced from 2 to 1. Single-word keywords (e.g., "lhkpn") previously could never reach score ≥2, causing template matching to fail for titles containing only a single keyword. `len(kw.split())` for single-word keywords = 1 point, which was below threshold.

`templates/formulir_pendaftaran.json` — Template for application/registration forms (seleksi, diklat, rekrutmen). Keywords: formulir, pendaftaran, seleksi, lamaran, biodata pribadi, daftar riwayat hidup, kartu pendaftaran. Identifiers: national_id, phone. Person count: few. Can be blank form or filled.

`templates/pengumuman_hasil_seleksi.json` — Template for selection result announcements (JPT, CPNS, PPPK). Keywords: pengumuman, hasil seleksi, lolos seleksi, memenuhi syarat, seleksi administrasi. Identifiers: name. Person count: many.
AGENT.md: Added BatchProcessor single-process warning (JANGAN memecah batch ke beberapa subprocess terpisah; satu `bp.flush()` di akhir untuk semua person).

`templates/izin_dpmptsp.json` — Template untuk izin terdaftar/operasional tunggal dari DPMPTSP (izin PAUD, TK, lembaga pendidikan). Keywords: izin terdaftar, izin operasional, dpm-ptsp, paud, taman kanak-kanak. Identifiers: phone, employee_id. Person count: few (1 applicant + 1 signatory).
AGENT.md: Added download.py path note (script auto-prepends `tmp/`, pass filename only). Added `history.py record` command example. Updated template list to include all 34 registered templates.
`templates/data_relawan.json` — Template untuk daftar relawan penanggulangan bencana/BPBD. Keywords: data relawan, relawan bencana, relawan bpbd, nama relawan. Identifiers: phone. Person count: many.

`scripts/download.py` — `_is_valid_file()` now rejects HTML/XML headers (`<!doctype html>`, `<html`, `<?xml`) before the printable-ASCII fallback check, preventing Cloudflare challenge pages from being accepted as valid downloads. Previously the captcha detection was only triggered when `_is_valid_file` returned False, but HTML pages passed the "90% printable" heuristic.

`templates/biodata_asn.json` — Template untuk biodata ASN/PNS/pejabat (single-person profile dari SIMPEG/sejenis). Keywords: biodata, biodata asn, biodata pns, biodata pejabat, profil asn, profil pns. Identifiers: NIP, phone, email. Person count: single.

`templates/laporan_spak.json` — Expanded keywords to also match SPKP (Survei Persepsi Kualitas Pelayanan) and zona integritas documents. Both SPAK and SPKP share the same structure (lembar pengesahan, signatories with NIP, survey methodology).
`templates/contact_person.json` — Template untuk daftar contact person/PIC (nama, HP, alamat kantor). Keywords: DAFTAR CONTACT PERSON, NO HP PIC, NAMA PIC, ORIENTASI, REGISTRASI ULANG.
`scripts/idgen.py` — ULID generation utility (`gen_id()` returns 26-char Crockford Base32 ULID, `is_valid_id()` validates ULID format)
`scripts/migrate_ulid.py` — One-time migration script for SHA256→ULID conversion

BREAKING: All person and document IDs are now 26-character ULID (Crockford Base32, e.g., `01JXQVK5RHZP0N3G8WBM7CD4YT`) instead of 64-character hex SHA256. ULIDs are time-sortable (timetamp + randomness), double-click selectable, and 128-bit entropy.
BREAKING: File naming changed from `{sha256hex}.json` to `{ulid}.json` for persons and documents. Photo files changed from `{sha256hex}.avif` to `{ulid}.avif`.
BREAKING: Node format in edges changed from `person:{sha256hex}`/`document:{sha256hex}` to `person:{ulid}`/`document:{ulid}`
`scripts/idgen.py` — Rewritten: `gen_id()` now returns 26-char ULID instead of 64-char SHA256 hex. Added `is_valid_id()` for ULID validation.
`scripts/document.py` — ID validation uses `is_valid_id()` (26-char Crockford Base32) instead of 64-char hex check
`scripts/person.py`, `scripts/history.py`, `scripts/face_crop.py`, `scripts/batch_create.py` — Updated docstrings with ULID examples
`samples/person.json`, `samples/document.json` — Updated with `{ulid}` placeholder instead of `{sha256hex}`
AGENT.md — Comprehensive update: ID format (ULID, 26-char Crockford Base32, time-sortable), all examples updated, edge format, script CLI examples
Migrated 4690 person files, 218 document files, 7649 index files, 152 history entries, 2 photo files from SHA256 hex to ULID
64-character hex SHA256 ID format — replaced by 26-character ULID
`scripts/idgen.py` — ID generation utility (originally SHA256, now ULID)
`scripts/migrate_ids.py` — One-time migration script for UUID→SHA256 conversion, `photos` array→`photo` string, `data/images/`→`data/photos/`
`scripts/migrate_ulid.py` — One-time migration script for SHA256→ULID conversion

BREAKING: All person and document IDs are now 64-character hex SHA256 (e.g., `3f8a1b2c4d5e6f7a...`) instead of prefixed UUIDs (`p-xxx`, `d-xxx`, `i-xxx`). IDs are double-click selectable with no hyphens or prefixes.
BREAKING: `photos` array field replaced with `photo` single string field. Photo path format: `data/photos/{person_id}.avif`. This is a schema-level change affecting all person JSON files.
BREAKING: `data/images/` directory renamed to `data/photos/`. Photo files are now named `{person_id}.avif` instead of `i-{uuid}.avif`.
BREAKING: Node format in edges changed from `person:p-xxx`/`document:d-xxx` to `person:{sha256hex}`/`document:{sha256hex}`
`scripts/person.py` — Uses `gen_id()` from `idgen.py`, removed `uuid` import, `photos` → `photo` in `_empty_person_data()`, removed `photos` from `ARRAY_FIELDS`
`scripts/document.py` — Uses `gen_id()`, validates 64-char hex format, `document:{sha256hex}` node format

`scripts/face_crop.py` — `PHOTOS_DIR = data/photos/`, returns `str` path instead of dict, `process_page()` returns `{"faces_detected": N, "photo": "data/photos/..."}`, `--person-id` CLI arg instead of `--doc-id`
`scripts/validate.py` — `photos` → `photo` in `VALID_PERSON_FIELDS`
`scripts/index.py`, `scripts/batch_create.py`, `scripts/history.py` — Updated docstrings with SHA256 hex ID examples
`samples/person.json` — Updated with SHA256 hex IDs, `photo: null` instead of `photos: []`, `person:{sha256hex}` node format, removed `i-{uuid}` photo ID
`samples/document.json` — Updated with SHA256 hex IDs and `document:{sha256hex}` edge format

AGENT.md — Comprehensive update: ID format (SHA256 hex, no prefix), `photo` field (string, not array), `data/photos/` directory, updated all examples, edge format, script CLI examples, index format, and workflow documentation
Migrated 4690 person files, 218 document files, 7650 index files, 152 history entries, 2 photo files from old UUID format to SHA256 hex
`data/images/` directory (replaced by `data/photos/`)
Old `p-{uuid}`, `d-{uuid}`, `i-{uuid}` ID format — no longer supported
`photos` array schema — replaced by `photo` string field

`scripts/extract_tabular.py` — Template-aware tabular data extraction (two-phase: Phase 1 deterministic/zero-LLM, Phase 2 semantic/LLM-only-if-needed). Maps spreadsheet columns to person fields via template `field_mapping` + `COLUMN_ALIASES`. Handles: name/title stripping, NIK/employee_id auto-detection, phone/email normalization, date parsing, TTL splitting, gender normalization, `_extras` for unmapped columns
AGENT.md: "Tabular Extraction" section (workflow step 2) with Phase 1/Phase 2 explanation, code example, column mapping priority, CLI usage, and special field handling documentation
AGENT.md: `extract_tabular.py` added to directory listing and script table
AGENT.md: Rule #25 updated with explicit mention of `extract_tabular.py` for tabular extraction
`scripts/extract_tabular.py`: Fixed imports — `is_valid_phone` from `normalize.py` (not `validate.py`), `strip_titles` from `title.py`, `VALID_PERSON_FIELDS` from `person.py` (not `validate.py`)

`scripts/extract_tabular.py`: Fixed `edges` field mapping — template field_mapping `"no hp": "edges"` now auto-detects phone/email content and normalizes to the correct person field instead of storing raw value

`scripts/parallel_download.py` — Parallel pre-download of pending queue URLs using subprocess workers. 4-8x faster for bulk downloads. Features: skip already-processed hashes, retry-failed mode, dry-run mode, ETA progress display
AGENT.md: "Terima Dokumen" section updated with pre-download workflow using `parallel_download.py`
AGENT.md: Script table updated with `parallel_download.py` entry
AGENT.md: Directory listing updated with `parallel_download.py`
AGENT.md: `index.py` script table entry updated with IndexCache and cache-stats CLI

`scripts/index.py`: `IndexCache.flush_dirty()` — incremental flush that only writes new/modified index entries to disk (~1ms for 5 entries vs ~660ms for full 7,651 entries). Dirty tracking via `_dirty_unique` and `_dirty_shared` sets cleared after flush

`scripts/index.py`: `IndexCache.update_for_person()` — extract identifiers from person data+edges and update index cache in one call. Combined with `flush_dirty()`, enables single-person incremental index update without full rebuild
`scripts/index.py`: `IndexCache.stats()` — now includes `dirty` count per index type
`scripts/index.py`: `update-person` CLI command — `python3 scripts/index.py update-person p-xxx` incrementally updates index for one person
`scripts/batch_create.py`: `BatchProcessor.flush()` now calls `cache.flush_dirty()` instead of `cache.flush_to_disk()` — only writes dirty entries
AGENT.md: Index Lookup section updated with flush comparison table (`flush_dirty` vs `flush_to_disk` vs `flush_index.sh`)
AGENT.md: Rule #13 updated with incremental flush options and speed comparison
`scripts/index.py`: `IndexCache` class moved from `scripts/batch_create.py` — now importable independently as `from scripts.index import IndexCache`
`scripts/batch_create.py`: `IndexCache` imported from `scripts/index.py` instead of defined inline
`scripts/batch_create.py`: Docstring updated to reference `IndexCache` in `index.py`

`scripts/batch_create.py` — BatchProcessor class for batch person creation with in-memory index caching. Eliminates subprocess overhead (~100x faster for >10 persons). Features: `IndexCache` (in-memory dict lookup instead of file I/O), automatic dedup via `find_person_by_identifiers()`, incremental index flush, and `--flush` CLI for index rebuild
AGENT.md: "Person Creation API" section rewritten with two modes — Batch (PREFERRED) and Individual (legacy). Includes code examples for BatchProcessor usage pattern
AGENT.md: Script table updated with `batch_create.py` entry
AGENT.md: Directory listing updated with `batch_create.py`
AGENT.md: Rule #12 updated — `Batch >10 person → BatchProcessor (PREFERRED)` instead of generic "Python script"
AGENT.md: Rule #13 updated — flush index via `bp.flush()` or `python3 scripts/batch_create.py --flush` as alternative to `./flush_index.sh`
AGENT.md: Rule #25 updated — added BatchProcessor requirement for batch processing

`templates/data_kelompok.json` — Template for community group data documents (fishing groups, farmer groups, etc.) with keywords: `kelompok nelayan`, `ketua kelompok`, `nama pengurus`, `sekretaris`, `kelas kelompok`, `pemula`, `madya`, `utama`
AGENT.md: Phone Dedup Caveat section — documents sequential batch processing false-merge risk when multiple persons share a phone in the same document
AGENT.md: Added `data_kelompok` to templates list

`scripts/title.py`: `SOCIAL_PREFIXES` list — handles Indonesian honorific address prefixes: `Bpk.` (Bapak/Mr.), `Ibu` (Mrs./Ms.), `Sdr.` (Saudara), `Sdri.` (Saudari). Stripped from `full_name` and stored in `extra` with category `"other"` and label `"Sapaan"`
`scripts/title.py`: `is_social_prefix()` function for social prefix detection

`scripts/face_crop.py`: `smart_crop_region()` — multi-strategy smart crop from rough LLM-identified photo region. Detects face via 3 strategies (full-image, region, expanded region) then crops centered on face with ID photo ratio (3:4). Prevents the failure mode where LLM coordinates capture text/labels instead of actual photo
`scripts/face_crop.py`: `detect_face_in_region()` — face detection constrained to a sub-region of the image
`scripts/face_crop.py`: `_adjust_to_id_ratio()` — adjusts crop coordinates to match ID photo aspect ratio
`scripts/face_crop.py`: `_save_crop()` — internal helper for saving pre-cropped PIL images as AVIF with ID sizing
`scripts/face_crop.py`: `ID_PHOTO_RATIO` (3/4), `ID_PHOTO_MAX_HEIGHT` (480), `ID_REGION_EXPAND_FACTOR` (1.5) constants
`scripts/face_crop.py`: `smart-crop` CLI command for smart cropping from rough coordinates
`scripts/face_crop.py`: `enforce_id_ratio` parameter on `crop_and_save()` for optional ID ratio enforcement
`scripts/face_crop.py`: Updated module docstring with function reference and ratio documentation
AGENT.md: Significantly expanded Photo Extraction section with smart cropping workflow, ID ratio enforcement, crop verification steps, and common pitfalls table
Photo crop now enforces ID card/passport ratio (3:4) to produce consistent portrait-style crops
LLM-identified photo regions now go through smart face detection before cropping, preventing text-only crops
